items.title: AFN Europe Report - June 26, 2026
items.description:
On this AFN Europe Report:

U.S. Marines and Airmen alongside NATO Allies participated in Ramstein Flag, a multidomain exercise spanning across more than 20 locations in Europe.

Senior enlisted leaders from the U.S. alongside NATO partner and Allied nations gathered for the 22nd International Command Senior Enlisted Leader Conference at the NATO School in Oberammergau, Germany.

(U.S. Air Force video by Airman 1st Class Alexandra Dale)

items.title: Pacific Update - B-29 Memorial Ceremony 2026 - NO GRAPHICS
items.description:
Pacific Update covering the B-29 Memorial Ceremony at Shizuoka Sengen Shrine on Saturday, June 20th, 2026. This ceremony allowed Airmen of the 374th Airlift Wing and Japanese allies to remember the midair collision of a B-29 Superfortress that claimed the lives of 23 U.S. Aircrew members, alongside nearly 2,000 Japanese civilians who perished in the resulting air raid.

(Courtesy Footage by U.S. Air Force Senior Airman Jacob Wood)

items.description: U.S. Marines test a newly derived Multi-Platform Driver Simulator at Marine Corps Base Camp Lejeune, North Carolina. items.title: Modernizing Underwater Egress Training; the MUET
items.description: U.S. Marines, Sailors, and Civilians test and train in the newly installed Modular Underwater Egress Trainer (MUET) at Marine Corps Base Camp Lejeune, North Carolina. The MUET is a newly developed version of the traditional Underwater Egress Trainer capable of training Marines in passenger and crew courses for Amphibius Assault Vehicle (AAV), Amphibius Combat Vehicle (ACV), and Joint Light Tactical Vehicle (JLTV) configurations.
